title: Hyperliquid Trading Bots Explained | Tread.FI CEO on AI Trading & HIP-3 Markets
summary_title: Tread's voting consortium, OpenClaw integration, and capital-efficient perpetual trading
summary_description: David, CEO of Tread, discusses user-driven exchange voting, Dream Cash fee comparisons, and upcoming AI-powered terminal.

key_moments.label: Tread's three-year history through market volatility and adaptation
Growth in algo trading awareness as users seek capital-efficient strategies
Grid and volatility-capturing bots designed for different market conditions
Institutional vs. retail trading patterns; systematic and long-short fund behavior
Tread partnerships with HIP3 deployers, vault incentives, and liquidity bootstrapping
Dream Cash fee comparison; Tread's 2 bps vs. Metamask's 10 bps
Tread Consortium voting and user-driven exchange integration decisions
Upcoming focus on terminal simplification and OpenClaw LLM integration

pull_quote: We're not scared to try new things. We'll just do what makes sense and do it to the best of our ability.
